name: Unauthorized Access Detection
reasoning: Person detected in a restricted space during non-operational hours.

name: Insufficient Lighting Alert
reasoning: Occupants present in a room with lights turned off, violating safety and productivity guidelines.

name: Energy Wastage Anomaly
reasoning: Active lighting or climate systems detected in an empty room past the allowed cooldown window.

name: Egress Obstruction Anomaly
reasoning: Physical obstruction detected in emergency pathway or egress corridor.

name: Occupancy Overcrowding Warning
reasoning: Personnel count exceeds the safety threshold for maximum capacity in this space.
